name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's most popular AI assistant — free forever
description: ChatGPT by OpenAI offers a powerful free tier with GPT-4o access, web browsing, image generation with DALL·E, and memory. One of the most capable free AI assistants available today with millions of daily users.
free_tier: Unlimited GPT-4o mini, generous GPT-4o daily limit, DALL·E image gen, memory

name: Claude
tagline: Thoughtful, nuanced AI for writing, coding and analysis
description: Claude by Anthropic is known for its long context window, thoughtful reasoning, and excellent writing quality. Handles complex multi-step tasks with nuance. Free tier gives generous daily access to Claude Sonnet.
free_tier: Daily Claude Sonnet access, 200K token context, file uploads, projects

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's AI — free, multimodal, and deeply integrated
description: Google Gemini offers a robust free tier with Gemini 1.5 Flash access, multimodal capabilities (text, images, audio), and Google Workspace integration. One of the most capable free AI tools available.
free_tier: Unlimited Gemini 1.5 Flash, image understanding, Google Docs/Sheets integration

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: AI-powered search that actually cites its sources
description: Perplexity replaces traditional search with AI answers backed by real-time web citations. Free tier gives unlimited searches with source citations and access to multiple AI models including GPT-4o and Claude.
free_tier: Unlimited searches, source citations, GPT-4o and Claude on free tier

name: NotebookLM
tagline: Google's AI research assistant — entirely free
description: NotebookLM by Google lets you upload documents, PDFs, YouTube videos and links, then ask questions about them. It even creates AI-generated audio podcasts from your sources. A game-changer for researchers and students.
free_tier: Completely free — no paid tier exists. Unlimited notebooks, 50 sources each.

name: Bolt.new
tagline: Full-stack web apps from a prompt, in your browser
description: Bolt.new lets you build, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web applications directly in the browser using AI. Supports React, Next.js, Vue, and more. One of the fastest ways to go from idea to deployed app.
free_tier: 150K tokens/day free, deploy to Netlify for free

name: Microsoft Copilot
tagline: Microsoft's free AI — powered by GPT-4o
description: Microsoft Copilot provides free access to GPT-4o with image generation, web search, and document analysis. Deeply integrated with Bing and Microsoft 365. A powerful free option especially for Windows users.
free_tier: Unlimited GPT-4o, DALL·E image gen, Bing web search — all free

name: Mistral Le Chat
tagline: Europe's best AI — blazing fast and free
description: Le Chat by Mistral AI offers free access to Mistral Large, one of the most capable open-weight AI models. Notably fast response times and strong multilingual support. Great ChatGPT alternative.
free_tier: Unlimited Mistral Large access, web search, image generation

name: HuggingChat
tagline: Open-source AI chat — no account needed
description: HuggingChat by Hugging Face provides free access to multiple open-source AI models including Llama, Mistral, and Qwen. No account required for basic use. Great for privacy-conscious users and developers.
free_tier: Unlimited — completely free, no account needed for basic use

name: Poe
tagline: Access 100+ AI models in one free app
description: Poe by Quora gives you access to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and 100+ other AI models in a single interface. Free tier provides daily message limits across all models.
free_tier: Daily message limits across 100+ AI models including GPT-4o and Claude

name: Cursor
tagline: AI-powered code editor — free for individuals
description: Cursor is a VS Code fork with deeply integrated AI coding assistance. It can understand your entire codebase, suggest multi-file edits, and chat about your code. Free tier is generous for individual developers.
free_tier: 2,000 completions/month, 50 slow premium requests — free forever

name: GitHub Copilot Free
tagline: Microsoft's AI coding assistant — now has a free tier
description: GitHub Copilot now offers a free tier with 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages per month. Works inside VS Code and JetBrains IDEs. Access to GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet models included.
free_tier: 2,000 completions/month, 50 chat messages, GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet

name: v0 by Vercel
tagline: Generate beautiful UI components with a single prompt
description: v0 generates React and HTML UI components from text prompts. Built by Vercel, it creates production-quality frontend code. Free tier includes a generous daily generation allowance for developers and designers.
free_tier: 10 free generations/day, full component library access

name: Replit
tagline: Code, build, and deploy apps — AI included free
description: Replit provides a browser-based IDE with AI assistance. Build and deploy apps without any local setup. The free tier includes AI coding assistance and hosting for small projects.
free_tier: Free Replit AI with daily messages, unlimited public repls, basic hosting

name: Phind
tagline: AI search engine built for developers
description: Phind is an AI search engine specifically designed for programmers. It searches the web and Stack Overflow, then synthesizes coding answers with working code examples. Free and extremely fast.
free_tier: Unlimited searches, code examples, web search — completely free

name: Consensus
tagline: AI search engine for scientific research papers
description: Consensus searches millions of scientific papers and synthesizes findings into clear answers with citations. Essential for researchers, students, and evidence-based decision-making. Free tier is very usable.
free_tier: 20 searches/day, full paper citations, evidence synthesis

name: You.com
tagline: Private AI search and assistant — totally free
description: You.com combines AI chat with web search, prioritizing user privacy. Offers multiple AI modes including research, coding, writing, and image generation — all free. Strong privacy controls.
free_tier: Unlimited AI searches and chat, image generation, private mode

name: Ideogram
tagline: AI image gen that nails text inside images
description: Ideogram is an AI image generator that excels at rendering legible, accurate text within images — a common failure point for other tools. Free tier is generous with daily slow-queue generations.
free_tier: 10 slow generations/day, unlimited slow-queue access

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Adobe's AI image gen — commercially safe output
description: Adobe Firefly generates images trained only on licensed Adobe Stock content, making it safe to use commercially. Free tier provides 25 generative credits per month — includes text effects and vector recoloring.
free_tier: 25 generative credits/month, commercial use allowed

name: Canva AI
tagline: Design anything with AI — free for individuals
description: Canva's free tier includes AI-powered design tools: Magic Write for copy, Magic Design for instant layouts, background remover, and AI image generation. The most accessible design tool for non-designers.
free_tier: 500 AI image generations/month, Magic Write 50 uses/month, background remover

name: Krea AI
tagline: Real-time AI image generation as you type
description: Krea AI offers real-time image generation that updates live as you type your prompt. Also includes upscaling, video generation, and image enhancement. Free tier provides 35 daily generations.
free_tier: 35 free daily generations, real-time canvas, upscaling tools

name: Suno
tagline: Generate full songs with lyrics from a text prompt
description: Suno creates complete, radio-quality songs — vocals, instruments, lyrics — from a simple text description. The free tier gives you 50 daily credits, enough for about 10 songs. Supports dozens of genres.
free_tier: 50 credits/day (~10 songs), non-commercial use

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Hyper-realistic AI voices for any content
description: ElevenLabs creates the most realistic AI voices available. Free tier provides 10,000 characters per month — enough for voiceovers, podcasts, audiobooks, and more. Supports 30+ languages and voice cloning.
free_tier: 10,000 characters/month, 3 custom voices, 30+ languages

name: Udio
tagline: Generate studio-quality music from text descriptions
description: Udio is a powerful AI music generator that creates professional-sounding tracks from text. Competes strongly with Suno in quality. Free tier gives 1,200 credits per month — about 300 song clips.
free_tier: 1,200 credits/month (~300 song clips), non-commercial use

name: Descript
tagline: Edit audio and video by editing the transcript
description: Descript lets you edit podcasts and videos as if editing a document — just delete words in the transcript to remove them from the audio. AI-powered transcription, noise removal, and eye contact correction included.
free_tier: 3 hours of transcription/month, unlimited projects, AI filler word removal

name: Kling AI
tagline: Text-to-video AI with a surprisingly generous free tier
description: Kling AI generates high-quality videos from text prompts or images. One of the best free video AI tools — the daily credit allowance is genuinely useful for content creators and marketers.
free_tier: 66 free credits/day, up to 5s HD videos

name: Luma Dream Machine
tagline: Cinematic AI video generation from text or images
description: Luma's Dream Machine creates smooth, high-quality video clips from text or images. Known for exceptional motion quality and photorealism. Free tier gives 30 video generations per month.
free_tier: 30 free video generations/month, 720p HD output

name: Pika
tagline: Create and edit videos with AI in seconds
description: Pika lets you generate short videos from text or images, and edit existing videos with AI. Free tier provides 250 monthly credits for video generation. Popular with social media creators.
free_tier: 250 credits/month free, HD video generation

name: Runway
tagline: Professional video AI used by filmmakers
description: Runway offers AI video generation and editing tools used by professional filmmakers. Gen-3 Alpha produces cinematic quality output. Free tier gives 125 one-time credits to explore the platform.
free_tier: 125 lifetime credits on signup, video generation and editing

name: Gamma
tagline: Beautiful AI presentations in seconds
description: Gamma creates stunning presentations, documents, and webpages from a prompt or outline. Free tier includes AI credits on signup and unlimited viewing, exporting to PDF and PowerPoint.
free_tier: 400 AI credits on signup, unlimited views, export to PDF/PPT

name: Tome
tagline: AI-powered storytelling and presentations
description: Tome creates dynamic, interactive AI presentations that go beyond static slides. Perfect for pitches, reports, and portfolios. Free tier allows unlimited creation and sharing of presentations.
free_tier: Unlimited pages and presentations, AI generation, sharing

name: Napkin AI
tagline: Turn text into beautiful diagrams automatically
description: Napkin AI converts your text and ideas into professional diagrams, flowcharts, and visuals instantly. Perfect for business presentations, technical documentation, and explaining complex ideas visually.
free_tier: Free forever plan with unlimited public diagrams

name: Otter.ai
tagline: AI meeting transcription and notes — free forever
description: Otter.ai automatically transcribes meetings, interviews, and lectures in real time. Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Free tier gives 300 minutes of transcription per month.
free_tier: 300 transcription minutes/month, AI meeting summaries, Zoom/Meet integration

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI writing and summarization inside your workspace
description: Notion AI is embedded directly inside Notion pages. Use it to summarize documents, fix writing, generate content, and answer questions about your notes. Notion's free plan itself is excellent.
free_tier: 20 free AI responses to try; Notion free plan (without AI) is excellent

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistant — free for core features
description: Grammarly's free tier provides real-time grammar, spelling, and punctuation corrections across all your writing. Works everywhere via browser extension. The free tier is genuinely useful for everyday writing.
free_tier: Unlimited grammar/spelling checks, tone detection, browser extension

name: Writesonic
tagline: AI content writer with a usable free tier
description: Writesonic helps create blog posts, ads, product descriptions, and more using AI. Free tier includes 10,000 words per month with access to GPT-3.5, useful for bloggers and small business owners.
free_tier: 10,000 words/month free, 100+ AI writing templates

name: ChatPDF
tagline: Chat with any PDF document — free
description: ChatPDF lets you upload any PDF and ask questions about it. Great for research papers, legal documents, textbooks, and reports. Free tier allows 2 PDFs per day up to 120 pages each.
free_tier: 2 PDFs/day (up to 120 pages each), 50 questions per PDF

name: Soundraw
tagline: AI music for creators — free to compose
description: Soundraw generates royalty-free music for videos, podcasts, and content creation. Free tier lets you generate and preview unlimited music. You only pay when you want to download a track.
free_tier: Generate and preview unlimited music free — pay only to download

name: Mixo
tagline: Launch an AI-built landing page in seconds
description: Mixo generates complete startup landing pages from a single sentence description. Includes email collection, SEO optimization, and fast deployment. Free tier gives you one live site.
free_tier: 1 live AI-generated website, email collection, SEO basics
